title: DBSIZE
description: Returns the number of keys in the database.

sections.title: Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility

content:
This command's behavior varies in clustered Redis environments. See the [multi-key operations]() page for more information. Return the number of keys in the currently-selected database. ## Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility | Redis
Software | Redis
Cloud | Notes | |:----------------------|:-----------------|:------| | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | | ## Return information **RESP2:** [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): the number of keys in the currently-selected database. **RESP3:** [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): the number of keys in the currently-selected database.
intro:
This command's behavior varies in clustered Redis environments. See the [multi-key operations]() page for more information.



Return the number of keys in the currently-selected database.
